verses.1: A Psalm of Asaph. The Mighty One, God, the LORD, has spoken And summoned the earth, from the rising of the sun to its setting.
verses.2: Out of Zion, the perfection of beauty, God has shone.
verses.3: May our God come and not keep silent; Fire devours before Him, And a storm is violently raging around Him.
verses.4: He summons the heavens above, And the earth, to judge His people:
verses.5: “Gather My godly ones to Me, Those who have made a covenant with Me by sacrifice.”
verses.6: And the heavens declare His righteousness, For God Himself is judge. Selah
verses.7: “Hear, My people, and I will speak; Israel, I will testify against you; I am God, your God.
verses.8: “I do not rebuke you for your sacrifices, And your burnt offerings are continually before Me.
verses.9: “I will not take a bull from your house, Nor male goats from your folds.
verses.10: “For every animal of the forest is Mine, The cattle on a thousand hills.
verses.11: “I know every bird of the mountains, And everything that moves in the field is Mine.
verses.12: “If I were hungry I would not tell you, For the world is Mine, and everything it contains.
verses.13: “Shall I eat the flesh of bulls Or drink the blood of male goats?
verses.14: “Offer God a sacrifice of thanksgiving And pay your vows to the Most High;
verses.15: Call upon Me on the day of trouble; I will rescue you, and you will honor Me.”
verses.16: But to the wicked God says, “What right do you have to tell of My statutes And to take My covenant in your mouth?
verses.17: “For you yourself hate discipline, And you throw My words behind you.
verses.18: “When you see a thief, you become friends with him, And you associate with adulterers.
verses.19: “You let your mouth loose in evil, And your tongue harnesses deceit.
verses.20: “You sit and speak against your brother; You slander your own mother’s son.
verses.21: “These things you have done and I kept silent; You thought that I was just like you; I will rebuke you and present the case before your eyes.
verses.22: “Now consider this, you who forget God, Or I will tear you in pieces, and there will be no one to save you.
verses.23: “He who offers a sacrifice of thanksgiving honors Me; And to him who sets his way properly I will show the salvation of God.”
